jd_text:
🚀 We’re Hiring: Project Director | UAE
We are currently seeking an experienced #Project_Director to lead and oversee large-scale #construction projects for one of our clients in the UAE. This role requires a strategic leader with strong project management expertise, particularly in high-rise tower developments.
🔹 Key ResponsibilitiesCoordinate teams and departments to ensure successful #project executionDevelop and manage project timelines and ensure timely deliveryPrepare project #budgets and monitor spending within approved resourcesRecommend #adjustments to keep projects on #schedule and within #budgetDevelop #contingency_plans when requiredPresent project updates to investors, business partners, and senior executivesReview, approve, or reject project #proposalsManage contracts with external agencies and vendorsLead project teams, managers, and internal stakeholdersTrack project milestones and adjust plans when necessaryPrepare team schedules and delegate tasks effectivelyMonitor employee performance and identify improvement opportunitiesSet team goals and ensure alignment with project objectivesEnsure managers and teams meet project deadlinesAddress operational challenges raised by team membersParticipate in hiring and onboarding new managersSupport training and orientation aligned with company policies and procedures
🔹 Requirements5–7+ years of experience as a Senior Project Manager or Project DirectorProven experience managing #high_rise_tower projects (50+ floors)Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering, Building Construction, or equivalentStrong leadership and stakeholder management skillsArabic speaker (mandatory)
#Hiring #ProjectDirector #ConstructionJobs #UAEJobs #EngineeringJobs #ProjectManagement #HiringNow
